title: plectranthus occidentalis
intro: Plectranthus occidentalis, also known as the Swartkrans sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in South Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Plectranthus occidentalis include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a valuable natural remedy. In traditional herbal medicine, Plectranthus occidentalis is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
